<!-- One paragraph: what would this feature do and why is it useful? -->

<!-- What problem does this solve? What's the current workaround, if any? -->

<!-- Describe how you'd like this to work. Be as specific as you can. -->

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why is your proposed solution better? -->
